[메인 프롬프트]  
A visually engaging illustration of a futuristic HTML file icon, symbolizing the Gwtar single-file HTML format. The icon should be surrounded by various digital assets like images, scripts, and stylesheets, all converging into the single file, showcasing the concept of lazy loading and efficient resource management. Include visual elements like a loading bar to represent HTTP range requests, and incorporate a stylized representation of the Gwern.net website in the background to highlight its usage.

[스타일]  
Minimalist, flat design with a touch of digital art.

[분위기]  
Modern and innovative, conveying a sense of efficiency and technological advancement.

[색상]  
Cool tones with shades of blue and green, accented by white and light gray for a clean, tech-oriented look.
